title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
